title: getPathToAuth(): bail on any error, not just ENOENT
body:
It's possible for stat() to fail in ways other than ENOENT.
If it does, bail out instead of silently cascading an
error condition.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body: @edsantiago Can you open this against containers/image, so the upstream library gets the change?
